Name: Autoimmune Disease
Description: A condition in which the body's immune system mistakes its own healthy tissues as foreign and attacks them.

Name: CNS
Description: CNS (Central Nervous System) With many unmet needs across a myriad of conditions affecting the central nervous system

Name: Cardiology
Description: Cardiology is a branch of medicine that deals with disorders of the heart and the cardiovascular system. The field includes medical diagnosis and treatment of congenital heart defects, coronary artery disease, heart failure, valvular heart disease, and electrophysiology.

Name: Cardiovascular Disease
Description: Cardiovascular disease is any disease involving the heart or blood vessels.

Name: Dermatology
Description: Dermatology is the branch of medicine dealing with the skin. It is a speciality with both medical and surgical aspects

Name: Disease
Description: A disease is a particular abnormal condition that adversely affects the structure or function of all or part of an organism and is not immediately due to any external injury.

Name: Endocrinology
Description: Endocrinology is a branch of biology and medicine dealing with the endocrine system, its diseases, and its specific secretions known as hormones.

Name: Gastroenteralogy
Description: Gastroenterology is the branch of medicine focused on the digestive system and its disorders.

Name: Gene Therapy
Description: Gene therapy is a medical technology that aims to produce a therapeutic effect through the manipulation of gene expression or through altering the biological properties of living cells.

Name: Hematology
Description: Hematology is the branch of medicine concerned with the study of the cause, prognosis, treatment, and prevention of diseases related to blood.

Name: Immunology
Description: The immune system protects us from infection through various lines of defence.

Name: Infectious Diseases
Description: Caused by microorganisms such as bacteria, viruses, fungi, or parasites, infectious diseases range from mild, self-limiting infections to severe, life threatening.

Name: Medical Devices
Description: A medical device can be any instrument, apparatus, implement, machine, appliance, implant, reagent for in vitro use, software, material or other similar or related article, intended by the manufacturer to be used, alone or in combination for a medical purpose.

Name: Nephrology
Description: Nephrology is a specialty for both adult internal medicine and pediatric medicine that concerns the study of the kidneys, specifically normal kidney function and kidney disease, the preservation of kidney health, and the treatment of kidney disease, from diet and medication to renal replacement therapy.

Name: Neurology
Description: Neurology is the branch of medicine dealing with the diagnosis and treatment of all categories of conditions and disease involving the nervous system, which comprises the brain, the spinal cord and the peripheral nerves.

Name: Neuroscience
Description: Neuroscience is the scientific study of the nervous system, its functions and disorders.

Name: Oncology
Description: Oncology is a branch of medicine that deals with the study, treatment, diagnosis, and prevention of cancer.

Name: Opthamology
Description: Ophthalmology is a clinical and surgical specialty within medicine that deals with the diagnosis and treatment of eye disorders.

Name: Pain Management
Description: Pain management is an aspect of medicine and health care involving relief of pain in various dimensions, from acute and simple to chronic and challenging.

Name: Pediatrics
Description: Pediatrics is the branch of medicine that involves the medical care of infants, children, adolescents, and young adults.

Name: Pulmonary
Description: Pulmonary means of or relating to the lungs.

Name: Respiratory
Description: Relating to breathing.

Name: Rheumatology
Description: Rheumatology is a branch of medicine devoted to the diagnosis and management of disorders whose common feature is inflammation in the bones, muscles, joints, and internal organs

Name: Vaccines
Description: A substance used to stimulate immunity to a particular infectious disease or pathogen, typically prepared from an inactivated or weakened form of the causative agent or from its constituents or products.

Name: Unknown
Description: Unknown
